title: WhatsApp Coexistence Mode: Keep Your Phone AND Get Full Automation
author: Mobibix
keywords: WhatsApp automation without losing phone access
excerpt: The #1 reason shop owners avoid WhatsApp automation: 'I don't want to lose access on my phone.' Coexistence mode solves exactly that. Here's how it works in Mobibix — and why you should switch today.
content:
## The Fear That Kept Shops Away from WhatsApp API

For the past two years, the most common pushback we heard from mobile shop owners was this: **"If I connect my WhatsApp to software, will I lose my phone?"**

It is a fair concern. The old unofficial solutions (WhatsApp Web bots, Baileys-based tools) had a real problem — they basically hijacked your WhatsApp Web session. If your phone battery died, the automation died too. Worse, Meta could detect the unofficial access and permanently ban your number.

That era is over. **Coexistence Mode** on the Official Meta Cloud API changes everything.

---

## What is Coexistence Mode?

Coexistence Mode is a feature of Meta's official WhatsApp Cloud API that lets a business run **two things simultaneously** on the same WhatsApp Business number:

* Your **WhatsApp Business App** on your phone (for personal replies, camera sharing, voice notes)
* A **software platform** like Mobibix (for automation, team inbox, menu bots, AI replies)

Both run at the same time. Neither blocks the other.

When a customer messages you, both your phone and Mobibix receive it. You can reply from either side. The bot only activates when your team is not actively handling the conversation.

---

## How Mobibix Implements Coexistence

When you connect via **Continue with Facebook** in Mobibix, we use Meta's Embedded Signup v3 with `featureType: "whatsapp_business_app_onboarding"` — the specific flag Meta requires for Coexistence.

Here is what happens behind the scenes:

* **Step 1**: You authorise Mobibix via Facebook Login — Meta verifies your WABA (WhatsApp Business Account)
* **Step 2**: We subscribe to your number's webhook — all incoming messages now flow into Mobibix's inbox in real time
* **Step 3**: We trigger a **data sync** — your existing contacts and message history are pulled into the Mobibix inbox so you start with context, not a blank slate
* **Step 4**: Your WhatsApp Business App continues working normally — you receive messages there too

No QR code. No web session. No unofficial hacks. This is Meta's official channel.

---

## The Difference Between Coexistence and Cloud-API-Only

When you set up Mobibix, you actually choose between two modes:

* **Coexistence** — Connect your existing number. Keep phone access. Best for 99% of shop owners.
* **New Number / Full Migration** — Register a brand-new number directly on Cloud API. Your phone app loses access on that number. Only relevant for businesses setting up a dedicated support line.

For a small or medium repair shop owner, **Coexistence is always the right choice**. You do not need to change your phone setup at all.

---

## What You Actually Get with Official API in Mobibix

Once connected, here is what changes for your shop:

* **Real-time Team Inbox**: All messages appear in Mobibix's inbox, visible to your entire team. Assign conversations to specific staff members. No more checking "whose WhatsApp did the customer message?"

* **Menu Bot**: Build an interactive numbered menu. A customer types '1' for repair status, '2' for pricing, '3' to talk to a human. The bot runs 24/7, even at 2am.

* **AI Replies**: On any deep menu option, turn on AI Mode. Write a custom system prompt (e.g. 'You are a repair assistant — answer questions about iPhone screen repairs at this shop'). The AI handles the conversation, not you.

* **Automated Lead Capture**: If a customer taps 'Sales Enquiry' in your menu, Mobibix automatically creates a CRM prospect record and sends you a WhatsApp alert — no manual data entry.

* **Unread Tracking**: See exactly how many unread messages are waiting. Open a conversation and it marks as read — just like a regular messaging app, but for your whole team.

---

## What About the Authkey Option?

Mobibix also supports **Authkey** — a CPaaS (Communications Platform as a Service) provider. Authkey is best for:

* Sending bulk campaign broadcasts to hundreds of customers
* Sending transactional reminders (repair ready, payment due) via Meta-approved templates
* Shops that do not want to connect their own Meta account

Authkey uses Mobibix's shared platform number, so there is no phone connection needed. But it does not support the real-time inbox, menu bot, or AI replies that the Official Meta API enables.

Most serious shops end up using **both**: Authkey for scheduled reminders and campaigns, Meta Coexistence for live inbox and automation.

---

## Is There a Risk of Getting Banned?

With the **Official Meta Cloud API**, the answer is no — as long as you follow Meta's policies. This is an officially approved integration. Meta does not ban businesses for using their own API.

The only time ban risk arises is:

* Sending unsolicited bulk messages to numbers who have not messaged you first (Marketing policy violation)
* Using unofficial Baileys/WhatsApp Web bots — which Mobibix does NOT use

Mobibix's automation only responds to inbound messages (customer messages you first), which is always policy-compliant.

---

## How to Get Started

In Mobibix, go to **WhatsApp → Dashboard**. If you have not connected yet, you will see the service selector. Click **Official Meta API**, then **Continue with Facebook**. Log in with the Facebook account that manages your WhatsApp Business number. Follow the prompts — it takes about 3 minutes.

If you see a 6-digit PIN prompt, that is WhatsApp's two-step verification. Check your WhatsApp app for the notification.

Once connected, your phone keeps working exactly as before. Mobibix adds a layer on top — it does not replace anything.
